debug_info.goal:
s : Set ℝ
h : NullMeasurableSet s volume
⊢ ∃ t ⊆ s, MeasurableSet t ∧ volume t = volume s ∧ volume (s \ t) = 0

proof:
have ⟨t, ht, htm, hts⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  refine ⟨t, ht, htm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact measure_congr hts
  · exact ae_le_set.mp hts.symm.le
successful_attempts:
have ⟨t, ht, htm, hts⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  refine ⟨t, ht, htm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact measure_congr hts
  · exact ae_le_set.mp hts.symm.le

  refine ⟨t, ht, htm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact measure_congr hte
  · exact ae_le_set.mp hte.symm.le

have ⟨t, t_sub_s, t_m, t_eq_s⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
  refine ⟨t, t_sub_s, t_m, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact measure_congr t_eq_s
  · exact ae_le_set.mp t_eq_s.symm.le

simpa using (by
    have ⟨t, ht, htm, hts⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq
    refine ⟨t, ht, htm, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact measure_congr hts
    · exact ae_le_set.mp hts.symm.le)

have ⟨t, t_sub_s, t_m, t_eq_s⟩ := h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq

  · exact measure_congr t_eq_s
  · exact ae_le_set.mp t_eq_s.symm.le

rcases h.exists_measurable_subset_ae_eq with ⟨t, hts, ht, h_ae⟩
  refine ⟨t, hts, ht, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact measure_congr h_ae
  · exact ae_le_set.mp h_ae.symm.le

  refine ⟨t, ht, htm, measure_congr h_ae, ?_⟩
